name: 2026.13.3 (Plus 3)
body:
## SourceGit Plus v2026.13.3 (Plus 3)

### Fixes
* **Tree/list selection** — clicking another row (or a parent folder in file-tree mode) now reliably changes the selection instead of ignoring the click.
* **Expander buttons** — chevrons in branch/file/change trees only consume the click when expanding/collapsing, not on every pointer press.

### Also in Plus 2
* Caption buttons clickable across full title bar height on Windows (Avalonia 12).
* Update check synced with VERSION / ``data/version.json``.

---
Upstream base: v2026.13 — https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit/releases/tag/v2026.13
